reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Bordeaux-Mérignac on future date(s) will be higher than on 2025-11-09. While specific future resolution dates are omitted from the text, the question closure date is 2026-02-07. Comparing early November to early February: Bordeaux's average daily temperature around Nov 9 is approximately 11°C, whereas around Feb 7 it is typically cooler, averaging 7°C. The standard deviation of daily average temperatures in these months is around 3.5-4°C. Calculating the probability that a random draw from the February distribution is greater than one from the November distribution (a difference with mean -4°C and standard deviation ~5.3°C) yields a Z-score around 0.75, which corresponds to a roughly 23% likelihood. Therefore, a probability around 0.23 is historically appropriate.
